---
title: "TumorModule"
author: "KQ"
date: "2025-07-29"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Load in Merged Object
```{r}
merged_data_all_7 <- readRDS("/Users/queitsch/Documents/AdeyLab/1_Hybrid_Fusion/SmartSeq_CRC177_DeepSeq/SmartSeqMerged.rds")
```
# Generate EPCAM TUMOR MODULE
```{r}
# ========================================
# EPCAM TUMOR vs CD45 IMMUNE GENE MODULE GENERATION
# ========================================
# This script generates gene modules for EpcamTumor cells vs CD45Immune cells
# and saves results with the "TumorModule" prefix

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(dplyr)

# ========================================
# PART 1: Data Preparation and Validation
# ========================================

# Check if required columns exist
required_cols <- c("WellCellType")
missing_cols <- required_cols[!required_cols %in% colnames(merged_data_all_7@meta.data)]
if(length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(paste("Missing required columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
}

# Check available cell types
cat("=== CELL TYPE DISTRIBUTION ===\n")
cat("WellCellType counts:\n")
print(table(merged_data_all_7$WellCellType))

# Define cell groups for analysis
target_group <- "EpcamTumor"
control_group <- "CD45Immune"

# Validate cell counts for each group
epcam_count <- sum(merged_data_all_7$WellCellType == target_group)
cd45_count <- sum(merged_data_all_7$WellCellType == control_group)

cat(paste("EpcamTumor cells:", epcam_count, "\n"))
cat(paste("CD45Immune cells:", cd45_count, "\n"))

if(epcam_count < 10 || cd45_count < 10) {
  warning("Very few cells in one or both groups - results may be unreliable")
}

# Join layers in the Seurat object
cat("Joining layers in Seurat object...\n")
merged_data_all_7 <- JoinLayers(merged_data_all_7)

# ========================================
# PART 2: Differential Expression Analysis
# ========================================

# Function to run differential expression analysis
run_tumor_differential_analysis <- function(seurat_obj, target_group, control_group) {
  cat(paste("Running DE analysis:", target_group, "vs", control_group, "\n"))

  # Get cells for each group
  target_cells <- rownames(seurat_obj@meta.data)[seurat_obj@meta.data$WellCellType == target_group]
  control_cells <- rownames(seurat_obj@meta.data)[seurat_obj@meta.data$WellCellType == control_group]

  cat(paste("Target (", target_group, ") cells:", length(target_cells), "\n"))
  cat(paste("Control (", control_group, ") cells:", length(control_cells), "\n"))

  if(length(target_cells) < 3 || length(control_cells) < 3) {
    stop(paste("Insufficient cells for comparison:", target_group, "vs", control_group))
  }

  # Create temporary grouping variable
  temp_group <- rep("Other", ncol(seurat_obj))
  temp_group[match(target_cells, colnames(seurat_obj))] <- "EpcamTumor"
  temp_group[match(control_cells, colnames(seurat_obj))] <- "CD45Immune"

  seurat_obj$temp_comparison <- temp_group

  # Set identity and run FindMarkers
  Idents(seurat_obj) <- "temp_comparison"

  tryCatch({
    markers <- FindMarkers(
      seurat_obj,
      ident.1 = "EpcamTumor",
      ident.2 = "CD45Immune",
      test.use = "wilcox",
      logfc.threshold = 0.25,
      min.pct = 0.1,
      verbose = FALSE,
      only.pos = FALSE
    )

    # Add gene names and comparison info
    markers$gene <- rownames(markers)
    markers$comparison <- paste(target_group, "vs", control_group, sep = "_")
    markers$target_group <- target_group
    markers$control_group <- control_group

    # Sort by log fold change
    markers <- markers[order(markers$avg_log2FC, decreasing = TRUE), ]

    cat(paste("Found", nrow(markers), "DE genes\n"))
    cat(paste("Upregulated in", target_group, ":", sum(markers$avg_log2FC > 0), "\n"))
    cat(paste("Downregulated in", target_group, ":", sum(markers$avg_log2FC < 0), "\n"))

    return(markers)
  }, error = function(e) {
    stop(paste("Error in DE analysis:", e$message))
  })
}

# Function to create tumor gene module from DE results
create_tumor_gene_module <- function(de_results, min_log2fc = 0.5, max_padj = 0.05,
                                   min_pct_diff = 0.1, n_genes_per_direction = 50) {
  if(is.null(de_results) || nrow(de_results) == 0) {
    return(list(up = character(0), down = character(0), all = character(0), stats = NULL))
  }

  # Filter for high-quality markers
  module_candidates <- de_results[
    abs(de_results$avg_log2FC) >= min_log2fc &
    de_results$p_val_adj <= max_padj &
    abs(de_results$pct.1 - de_results$pct.2) >= min_pct_diff,
  ]

  if(nrow(module_candidates) == 0) {
    cat("No genes meet module criteria\n")
    return(list(up = character(0), down = character(0), all = character(0), stats = NULL))
  }

  # Separate up and down regulated genes (relative to EpcamTumor)
  up_genes <- module_candidates[module_candidates$avg_log2FC > 0, ]  # Higher in EpcamTumor
  down_genes <- module_candidates[module_candidates$avg_log2FC < 0, ]  # Higher in CD45Immune

  # Get top genes
  module_up <- head(up_genes$gene, n_genes_per_direction)
  module_down <- head(down_genes$gene, n_genes_per_direction)
  module_all <- c(module_up, module_down)

  # Create stats summary
  stats_summary <- data.frame(
    total_de_genes = nrow(de_results),
    module_candidates = nrow(module_candidates),
    tumor_enriched = length(module_up),
    immune_enriched = length(module_down),
    total_module_genes = length(module_all),
    mean_abs_log2fc = round(mean(abs(module_candidates$avg_log2FC)), 3),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  return(list(
    up = module_up,
    down = module_down,
    all = module_all,
    stats = stats_summary,
    candidates = module_candidates
  ))
}

# ========================================
# PART 3: Run Tumor Module Analysis
# ========================================

cat("\n=== RUNNING TUMOR MODULE ANALYSIS ===\n")

# Run differential expression analysis
tumor_de_results <- run_tumor_differential_analysis(
  merged_data_all_7,
  target_group,
  control_group
)

# Create gene module
tumor_module <- create_tumor_gene_module(tumor_de_results)

# Print summary
cat("\n=== TUMOR MODULE SUMMARY ===\n")
if(!is.null(tumor_module$stats)) {
  stats <- tumor_module$stats
  cat(paste("Total DE genes:", stats$total_de_genes, "\n"))
  cat(paste("Module candidates:", stats$module_candidates, "\n"))
  cat(paste("Tumor-enriched genes:", stats$tumor_enriched, "\n"))
  cat(paste("Immune-enriched genes:", stats$immune_enriched, "\n"))
  cat(paste("Total module genes:", stats$total_module_genes, "\n"))
  cat(paste("Mean absolute log2FC:", stats$mean_abs_log2fc, "\n"))
}

# ========================================
# PART 4: Create Visualization
# ========================================

# Function to create volcano plot for tumor module
create_tumor_volcano_plot <- function(de_data) {
  if(is.null(de_data) || nrow(de_data) == 0) return(NULL)

  volcano_data <- de_data
  volcano_data$significance <- ifelse(volcano_data$p_val_adj < 0.05 & abs(volcano_data$avg_log2FC) > 0.5,
                                     "Significant", "Not Significant")
  volcano_data$direction <- ifelse(volcano_data$avg_log2FC > 0.5 & volcano_data$p_val_adj < 0.05, "Tumor-enriched",
                                 ifelse(volcano_data$avg_log2FC < -0.5 & volcano_data$p_val_adj < 0.05, "Immune-enriched", "NS"))

  # Label top genes
  top_tumor <- head(volcano_data[volcano_data$direction == "Tumor-enriched", ], 5)
  top_immune <- head(volcano_data[volcano_data$direction == "Immune-enriched", ], 5)
  volcano_data$label <- ifelse(volcano_data$gene %in% c(top_tumor$gene, top_immune$gene),
                              volcano_data$gene, "")

  p <- ggplot(volcano_data, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = direction), alpha = 0.6, size = 1.2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("Tumor-enriched" = "red", "Immune-enriched" = "blue", "NS" = "gray")) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_text_repel(aes(label = label), size = 3, max.overlaps = 15) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = "Tumor Module: EpcamTumor vs CD45Immune",
         x = "Average log2 Fold Change (EpcamTumor vs CD45Immune)",
         y = "-log10(Adjusted P-value)",
         color = "Gene Enrichment") +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"))

  return(p)
}

# Create and display volcano plot
tumor_volcano_plot <- create_tumor_volcano_plot(tumor_de_results)
if(!is.null(tumor_volcano_plot)) {
  print(tumor_volcano_plot)
  ggsave("TumorModule_volcano_plot.pdf", tumor_volcano_plot, width = 10, height = 8)
  cat("Saved volcano plot: TumorModule_volcano_plot.pdf\n")
}

# ========================================
# PART 5: Export Tumor Module Files
# ========================================

cat("\n=== EXPORTING TUMOR MODULE FILES ===\n")

# Create export data
if(length(tumor_module$all) > 0) {
  # Main module file
  tumor_export_df <- data.frame(
    Gene = tumor_module$all,
    Direction = c(rep("Tumor-enriched", length(tumor_module$up)), 
                  rep("Immune-enriched", length(tumor_module$down))),
    Module = "TumorModule",
    Comparison = "EpcamTumor_vs_CD45Immune",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  # Add detailed statistics
  if(!is.null(tumor_module$candidates)) {
    stats_subset <- tumor_module$candidates[tumor_module$candidates$gene %in% tumor_module$all,
                                          c("gene", "avg_log2FC", "p_val_adj", "pct.1", "pct.2")]
    colnames(stats_subset) <- c("Gene", "Log2FC", "Adj_Pvalue", "Pct_EpcamTumor", "Pct_CD45Immune")
    tumor_export_df <- merge(tumor_export_df, stats_subset, by = "Gene")
    tumor_export_df <- tumor_export_df[order(tumor_export_df$Log2FC, decreasing = TRUE), ]
  }

  # Save main tumor module file
  write.csv(tumor_export_df, "TumorModule_gene_signatures.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  cat("Saved: TumorModule_gene_signatures.csv\n")

  # Save separate files for up and down regulated genes
  tumor_enriched <- tumor_export_df[tumor_export_df$Direction == "Tumor-enriched", ]
  immune_enriched <- tumor_export_df[tumor_export_df$Direction == "Immune-enriched", ]

  write.csv(tumor_enriched, "TumorModule_tumor_enriched_genes.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  write.csv(immune_enriched, "TumorModule_immune_enriched_genes.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  
  cat("Saved: TumorModule_tumor_enriched_genes.csv\n")
  cat("Saved: TumorModule_immune_enriched_genes.csv\n")

  # Create simple gene lists (just gene names)
  write.table(tumor_module$up, "TumorModule_tumor_enriched_genelist.txt", 
              quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE, col.names = FALSE)
  write.table(tumor_module$down, "TumorModule_immune_enriched_genelist.txt", 
              quote = FALSE, row.names = FALSE, col.names = FALSE)
  
  cat("Saved: TumorModule_tumor_enriched_genelist.txt\n")
  cat("Saved: TumorModule_immune_enriched_genelist.txt\n")
}

# Save complete DE results with TumorModule prefix
write.csv(tumor_de_results, "TumorModule_complete_DE_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
cat("Saved: TumorModule_complete_DE_results.csv\n")

# Create summary statistics file
if(!is.null(tumor_module$stats)) {
  tumor_summary <- data.frame(
    Analysis = "TumorModule",
    Comparison = "EpcamTumor_vs_CD45Immune",
    Target_Cells = epcam_count,
    Control_Cells = cd45_count,
    Total_DE_Genes = tumor_module$stats$total_de_genes,
    Module_Candidates = tumor_module$stats$module_candidates,
    Tumor_Enriched_Genes = tumor_module$stats$tumor_enriched,
    Immune_Enriched_Genes = tumor_module$stats$immune_enriched,
    Total_Module_Genes = tumor_module$stats$total_module_genes,
    Mean_Abs_Log2FC = tumor_module$stats$mean_abs_log2fc,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  
  write.csv(tumor_summary, "TumorModule_analysis_summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)
  cat("Saved: TumorModule_analysis_summary.csv\n")
}

# ========================================
# PART 6: Display Final Results
# ========================================

cat("\n=== TUMOR MODULE GENE LISTS ===\n")

if(length(tumor_module$up) > 0) {
  cat("TUMOR-ENRICHED GENES (", length(tumor_module$up), "):\n")
  cat(paste(tumor_module$up, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
}

if(length(tumor_module$down) > 0) {
  cat("IMMUNE-ENRICHED GENES (", length(tumor_module$down), "):\n")
  cat(paste(tumor_module$down, collapse = ", "), "\n\n")
}

cat("\n=== ANALYSIS COMPLETE ===\n")
cat("Generated tumor module with", length(tumor_module$all), "genes\n")
cat("Files saved with 'TumorModule' prefix:\n")
cat("- TumorModule_gene_signatures.csv (main module file)\n")
cat("- TumorModule_tumor_enriched_genes.csv\n")
cat("- TumorModule_immune_enriched_genes.csv\n")
cat("- TumorModule_tumor_enriched_genelist.txt\n")
cat("- TumorModule_immune_enriched_genelist.txt\n")
cat("- TumorModule_complete_DE_results.csv\n")
cat("- TumorModule_analysis_summary.csv\n")
cat("- TumorModule_volcano_plot.pdf\n")

cat("\nTumor module analysis completed successfully!\n")
```
# Apply Tumor Module
```{r}
# ========================================
# TUMOR MODULE APPLICATION TO NEW DATASET
# ========================================
# This script applies the TumorModule gene signature to a new Seurat object

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(dplyr)
library(Matrix)

# ========================================
# PART 0: Load Data and TumorModule
# ========================================

# Load the new Seurat object
cat("Loading Seurat object...\n")
merged_seurat_hmm <- readRDS(file = "merged_seurat_sophisticated_triple_annotated.rds")

# Load the TumorModule gene signatures CSV
cat("Loading TumorModule signatures...\n")
tumor_module_export <- read.csv("TumorModule_gene_signatures.csv", stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Display the structure of the loaded module
cat("TumorModule structure:\n")
print(head(tumor_module_export))
cat("Total genes in TumorModule:", nrow(tumor_module_export), "\n")
cat("Tumor-enriched genes:", sum(tumor_module_export$Direction == "Tumor-enriched"), "\n")
cat("Immune-enriched genes:", sum(tumor_module_export$Direction == "Immune-enriched"), "\n")

# ========================================
# PART 1: Prepare TumorModule Gene Lists
# ========================================

# Extract genes by direction
tumor_enriched_genes <- tumor_module_export$Gene[tumor_module_export$Direction == "Tumor-enriched"]
immune_enriched_genes <- tumor_module_export$Gene[tumor_module_export$Direction == "Immune-enriched"]

cat("\nOriginal TumorModule genes:\n")
cat("Tumor-enriched:", length(tumor_enriched_genes), "genes\n")
cat("Immune-enriched:", length(immune_enriched_genes), "genes\n")

# Check which genes are present in the new dataset
genes_in_data_tumor <- tumor_enriched_genes[tumor_enriched_genes %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]
genes_in_data_immune <- immune_enriched_genes[immune_enriched_genes %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]
missing_genes_tumor <- tumor_enriched_genes[!tumor_enriched_genes %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]
missing_genes_immune <- immune_enriched_genes[!immune_enriched_genes %in% rownames(merged_seurat_hmm)]

cat("\nGenes available in new dataset:\n")
cat("Tumor-enriched genes found:", length(genes_in_data_tumor), "of", length(tumor_enriched_genes), "\n")
cat("Immune-enriched genes found:", length(genes_in_data_immune), "of", length(immune_enriched_genes), "\n")

if (length(missing_genes_tumor) > 0) {
  cat("Missing tumor-enriched genes:", paste(head(missing_genes_tumor, 10), collapse = ", "))
  if (length(missing_genes_tumor) > 10) cat(" ... and", length(missing_genes_tumor) - 10, "more")
  cat("\n")
}

if (length(missing_genes_immune) > 0) {
  cat("Missing immune-enriched genes:", paste(head(missing_genes_immune, 10), collapse = ", "))
  if (length(missing_genes_immune) > 10) cat(" ... and", length(missing_genes_immune) - 10, "more")
  cat("\n")
}

# Store gene lists for TumorModule
tumor_module_gene_lists <- list(
  Tumor_Enriched = genes_in_data_tumor,
  Immune_Enriched = genes_in_data_immune
)

# ========================================
# PART 2: Calculate TumorModule Scores
# ========================================

cat("\n=== Calculating TumorModule Scores ===\n")

# Set default assay - Updated for Seurat v5
if ("SCT" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@assays)) {
  DefaultAssay(merged_seurat_hmm) <- "SCT"
  # For Seurat v5, use 'data' layer
  expr_data <- LayerData(merged_seurat_hmm, assay = "SCT", layer = "data")
  cat("Using SCT assay for scoring\n")
} else {
  DefaultAssay(merged_seurat_hmm) <- "RNA"
  # For Seurat v5, use 'data' layer  
  expr_data <- LayerData(merged_seurat_hmm, assay = "RNA", layer = "data")
  cat("Using RNA assay for scoring\n")
}

# Skip if no genes available
if (length(genes_in_data_tumor) == 0 && length(genes_in_data_immune) == 0) {
  stop("No valid genes found for TumorModule - cannot proceed.")
}

# Method 1: Using AddModuleScore with proper gene list structure
gene_lists <- list()
if (length(genes_in_data_tumor) > 0) {
  gene_lists[["Tumor_Enriched"]] <- genes_in_data_tumor
}
if (length(genes_in_data_immune) > 0) {
  gene_lists[["Immune_Enriched"]] <- genes_in_data_immune
}

if (length(gene_lists) > 0) {
  # Calculate control size
  ctrl_size <- min(100, max(length(genes_in_data_tumor), length(genes_in_data_immune), 5))
  
  cat("Using control size:", ctrl_size, "\n")
  
  merged_seurat_hmm <- AddModuleScore(
    merged_seurat_hmm,
    features = gene_lists,
    name = "TumorModule_ModuleScore",
    ctrl = ctrl_size,
    seed = 42
  )

  # Extract the scores and rename properly
  module_score_cols <- grep("TumorModule_ModuleScore", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data), value = TRUE)
  
  if (length(gene_lists) == 2) {
    # Both tumor and immune genes present
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Tumor_Score"]] <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[module_score_cols[1]]]
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Immune_Score"]] <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[module_score_cols[2]]]
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Combined_Score"]] <-
      merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Tumor_Score"]] - merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Immune_Score"]]
  } else if ("Tumor_Enriched" %in% names(gene_lists)) {
    # Only tumor genes present
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Tumor_Score"]] <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[module_score_cols[1]]]
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Immune_Score"]] <- 0
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Combined_Score"]] <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Tumor_Score"]]
  } else if ("Immune_Enriched" %in% names(gene_lists)) {
    # Only immune genes present
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Tumor_Score"]] <- 0
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Immune_Score"]] <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[module_score_cols[1]]]
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Combined_Score"]] <- -merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Immune_Score"]]
  }

  # Remove temporary module score columns
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[, !colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data) %in% module_score_cols]
}

# Method 2: Manual calculation for comparison
if (length(genes_in_data_tumor) > 0) {
  tumor_scores <- Matrix::colMeans(expr_data[genes_in_data_tumor, , drop = FALSE])
} else {
  tumor_scores <- rep(0, ncol(expr_data))
}

if (length(genes_in_data_immune) > 0) {
  immune_scores <- Matrix::colMeans(expr_data[genes_in_data_immune, , drop = FALSE])
} else {
  immune_scores <- rep(0, ncol(expr_data))
}

# Add manual scores
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Manual_Tumor_Score"]] <- tumor_scores
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Manual_Immune_Score"]] <- immune_scores
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Manual_Combined_Score"]] <- tumor_scores - immune_scores

# Choose which score to use for classification
score_name_combined <- "TumorModule_Combined_Score"
if (!score_name_combined %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  score_name_combined <- "TumorModule_Manual_Combined_Score"
  cat("Using manual combined score for classification\n")
}

# Define thresholds for classification
threshold_high <- quantile(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_combined]], 0.8, na.rm = TRUE)
threshold_low <- quantile(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_combined]], 0.2, na.rm = TRUE)

cat("High threshold (80th percentile):", round(threshold_high, 3), "\n")
cat("Low threshold (20th percentile):", round(threshold_low, 3), "\n")

# Classify cells based on TumorModule score
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Classification"]] <- ifelse(
  merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_combined]] >= threshold_high, "High_TumorModule",
  ifelse(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_combined]] <= threshold_low, "Low_TumorModule", "Medium_TumorModule")
)

# Count cells in each category
module_counts <- table(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Classification"]])
cat("TumorModule Cell Classification:\n")
print(module_counts)

# ========================================
# PART 3: Visualizations
# ========================================

cat("\n=== Creating TumorModule Visualizations ===\n")

# Run UMAP if not already present
if (!"umap" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@reductions)) {
  cat("Running UMAP...\n")
  merged_seurat_hmm <- RunUMAP(merged_seurat_hmm, dims = 1:30, verbose = FALSE)
}

# 1. UMAP colored by TumorModule combined score
p1 <- FeaturePlot(
  merged_seurat_hmm,
  features = score_name_combined,
  pt.size = 0.5,
  cols = c("blue", "lightgray", "red")
) +
  ggtitle("TumorModule Combined Score") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5))

# 2. UMAP colored by TumorModule classification
p2 <- DimPlot(
  merged_seurat_hmm,
  group.by = "TumorModule_Classification",
  pt.size = 0.5,
  cols = c("High_TumorModule" = "red", "Medium_TumorModule" = "gray", "Low_TumorModule" = "blue")
) +
  ggtitle("TumorModule Classification") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5))

# Combine UMAP plots
combined_umap <- p1 | p2
print(combined_umap)

# 3. Distribution of TumorModule scores
p3 <- ggplot(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data, aes(.data[[score_name_combined]])) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 50, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(threshold_low, threshold_high), 
             linetype = "dashed", color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Distribution of TumorModule Combined Scores",
       x = "TumorModule Score", y = "Number of Cells") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5))

print(p3)

# 4. Violin plot by clusters (if clusters exist)
if ("seurat_clusters" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  p4 <- VlnPlot(
    merged_seurat_hmm,
    features = score_name_combined,
    group.by = "seurat_clusters",
    pt.size = 0
  ) +
    ggtitle("TumorModule Scores by Cluster") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5))
  
  print(p4)
}

# 5. Compare tumor vs immune component scores
if ("TumorModule_Tumor_Score" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data) && 
    "TumorModule_Immune_Score" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  
  p5 <- FeaturePlot(
    merged_seurat_hmm,
    features = c("TumorModule_Tumor_Score", "TumorModule_Immune_Score"),
    ncol = 2,
    pt.size = 0.3
  )
  print(p5)
}

# 6. Heatmap of top TumorModule genes in high-scoring cells
high_tumor_cells <- colnames(merged_seurat_hmm)[merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Classification"]] == "High_TumorModule"]

if (length(high_tumor_cells) > 100) {
  high_tumor_cells <- sample(high_tumor_cells, 100)
}

top_tumor_genes <- head(genes_in_data_tumor, 10)
top_immune_genes <- head(genes_in_data_immune, 10)
top_genes <- c(top_tumor_genes, top_immune_genes)

if (length(top_genes) > 0 && length(high_tumor_cells) > 10) {
  tryCatch({
    p6 <- DoHeatmap(
      merged_seurat_hmm,
      features = top_genes,
      cells = high_tumor_cells,
      group.by = "TumorModule_Classification",
      size = 3
    ) +
      ggtitle("Top TumorModule Genes in High-Scoring Cells") +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5))
    
    print(p6)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("Could not create heatmap:", e$message, "\n")
  })
}

# 7. Feature plots for top tumor-enriched genes
if (length(top_tumor_genes) > 0) {
  tryCatch({
    p7 <- FeaturePlot(
      merged_seurat_hmm,
      features = head(top_tumor_genes, 4),
      ncol = 2,
      pt.size = 0.3
    )
    print(p7)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("Could not create feature plot for tumor genes:", e$message, "\n")
  })
}

# 8. Feature plots for top immune-enriched genes
if (length(top_immune_genes) > 0) {
  tryCatch({
    p8 <- FeaturePlot(
      merged_seurat_hmm,
      features = head(top_immune_genes, 4),
      ncol = 2,
      pt.size = 0.3
    )
    print(p8)
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("Could not create feature plot for immune genes:", e$message, "\n")
  })
}

# ========================================
# PART 4: Analysis by Cell Types (if available)
# ========================================

# Check for common cell type annotation columns
possible_celltype_cols <- c("celltype", "cell_type", "CellType", "annotation", "Annotation", "cluster", "refined_celltype")
celltype_col <- NULL

for (col in possible_celltype_cols) {
  if (col %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
    celltype_col <- col
    break
  }
}

if (!is.null(celltype_col)) {
  cat("\n=== TumorModule Analysis by Cell Types ===\n")
  cat("Using cell type column:", celltype_col, "\n")
  
  # Create summary by cell type
  celltype_summary <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data %>%
    group_by(.data[[celltype_col]]) %>%
    summarise(
      n_cells = n(),
      mean_tumor_score = mean(.data[[score_name_combined]], na.rm = TRUE),
      median_tumor_score = median(.data[[score_name_combined]], na.rm = TRUE),
      high_tumor_pct = sum(.data[["TumorModule_Classification"]] == "High_TumorModule") / n() * 100,
      .groups = 'drop'
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(mean_tumor_score))
  
  print(celltype_summary)
  
  # Violin plot by cell type
  p9 <- VlnPlot(
    merged_seurat_hmm,
    features = score_name_combined,
    group.by = celltype_col,
    pt.size = 0
  ) +
    ggtitle("TumorModule Scores by Cell Type") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  
  print(p9)
  
  # Box plot showing distribution
  p10 <- ggplot(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data, aes(x = .data[[celltype_col]], y = .data[[score_name_combined]])) +
    geom_boxplot(aes(fill = .data[[celltype_col]]), alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(threshold_low, threshold_high), 
               linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    labs(title = "TumorModule Score Distribution by Cell Type",
         x = "Cell Type", y = "TumorModule Score") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          legend.position = "none")
  
  print(p10)
}

# ========================================
# PART 5: Summary and Export
# ========================================

# Create comprehensive summary
cell_summary <- data.frame(
  Cell_ID = colnames(merged_seurat_hmm),
  TumorModule_Combined_Score = merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[score_name_combined]],
  TumorModule_Classification = merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Classification"]],
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# Add component scores if available
if ("TumorModule_Tumor_Score" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  cell_summary$TumorModule_Tumor_Score <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Tumor_Score"]]
}
if ("TumorModule_Immune_Score" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  cell_summary$TumorModule_Immune_Score <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Immune_Score"]]
}

# Add manual scores
cell_summary$TumorModule_Manual_Combined_Score <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Manual_Combined_Score"]]
cell_summary$TumorModule_Manual_Tumor_Score <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Manual_Tumor_Score"]]
cell_summary$TumorModule_Manual_Immune_Score <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[["TumorModule_Manual_Immune_Score"]]

# Add UMAP coordinates if available
if ("umap" %in% names(merged_seurat_hmm@reductions)) {
  umap_coords <- Embeddings(merged_seurat_hmm, reduction = "umap")
  cell_summary$UMAP_1 <- umap_coords[, 1]
  cell_summary$UMAP_2 <- umap_coords[, 2]
}

# Add cell type information if available
if (!is.null(celltype_col)) {
  cell_summary$Cell_Type <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data[[celltype_col]]
}

# Print final summary
cat("\n=== FINAL TUMOR MODULE SUMMARY ===\n")
cat("Total cells analyzed:", nrow(cell_summary), "\n")
cat("High TumorModule cells:", sum(cell_summary$TumorModule_Classification == "High_TumorModule"), "\n")
cat("Medium TumorModule cells:", sum(cell_summary$TumorModule_Classification == "Medium_TumorModule"), "\n")
cat("Low TumorModule cells:", sum(cell_summary$TumorModule_Classification == "Low_TumorModule"), "\n")
cat("Mean TumorModule score:", round(mean(cell_summary$TumorModule_Combined_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")
cat("Score range:", round(min(cell_summary$TumorModule_Combined_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "to",
    round(max(cell_summary$TumorModule_Combined_Score, na.rm = TRUE), 3), "\n")

# Save results
write.csv(cell_summary, "TumorModule_application_results.csv", row.names = FALSE)
saveRDS(merged_seurat_hmm, "merged_seurat_with_TumorModule.rds")

cat("\nTumorModule application complete!\n")
cat("Results saved to:\n")
cat("- TumorModule_application_results.csv\n")
cat("- merged_seurat_with_TumorModule.rds\n")

# Display available module columns
cat("\nTumorModule columns added to metadata:\n")
tumor_cols <- colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)[grep("TumorModule", colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data))]
print(tumor_cols)
```
# Panel: Q: Tumor Module
```{r}
# ========================================
# PANEL Q: TumorModule UMAP Visualization
# ========================================

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# Create output directory if it doesn't exist
if (!dir.exists("250725.Fig7Final")) {
  dir.create("250725.Fig7Final", recursive = TRUE)
}

# Create a formatted classification column for better legend labels
merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$TumorModule_Classification_Formatted <- factor(
  case_when(
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$TumorModule_Classification == "High_TumorModule" ~ "High Tumor Module",
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$TumorModule_Classification == "Medium_TumorModule" ~ "Medium Tumor Module",
    merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$TumorModule_Classification == "Low_TumorModule" ~ "Low Tumor Module",
    TRUE ~ as.character(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$TumorModule_Classification)
  ),
  levels = c("High Tumor Module", "Medium Tumor Module", "Low Tumor Module")
)

# 1. UMAP colored by TumorModule combined score
p1 <- FeaturePlot(
  merged_seurat_hmm,
  features = score_name_combined,
  pt.size = 0.5,
  cols = c("blue", "lightgray", "red")
) +
  ggtitle("TumorModule Combined Score") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 6, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

# 2. UMAP colored by TumorModule classification
p2 <- DimPlot(
  merged_seurat_hmm,
  group.by = "TumorModule_Classification_Formatted",
  pt.size = 0.5,
  cols = c("High Tumor Module" = "red", "Medium Tumor Module" = "gray", "Low Tumor Module" = "blue")
) +
  ggtitle("TumorModule Classification") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 6, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

# Combine UMAP plots
combined_umap <- p1 | p2

# Display the combined plot
print(combined_umap)

# Save individual plots
ggsave(
  filename = "250725.Fig7Final/250725.PanelQ.TumorModule_Combined_Score.pdf",
  plot = p1,
  width = 6,
  height = 5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = "250725.Fig7Final/250725.PanelQ.TumorModule_Classification.pdf",
  plot = p2,
  width = 6,
  height = 5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

# Save combined plot
ggsave(
  filename = "250725.Fig7Final/250725.PanelQ.TumorModule_Combined.pdf",
  plot = combined_umap,
  width = 12,
  height = 10,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

cat("Panel Q plots saved to 250725.Fig7Final/ directory:\n")
cat("- 250725.PanelQ.TumorModule_Combined_Score.pdf\n")
cat("- 250725.PanelQ.TumorModule_Classification.pdf\n")
cat("- 250725.PanelQ.TumorModule_Combined.pdf\n")
```
# Panel R:
```{r}
# ========================================
# TumorModule Classification by Selected Cell Types
# ========================================

library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)

# Create output directory if it doesn't exist
if (!dir.exists("250725.Fig7Final")) {
  dir.create("250725.Fig7Final", recursive = TRUE)
}

# Define the cell types we want to keep and their display names
target_celltypes <- c("CAF_Matrix", "Hybrid CHC1", "Hybrid CHC2", "Hybrid CHC3", 
                     "Endothelial cells", "Epithelial_General", "Hybrid THC")

# Create a mapping for display names (clean up the names)
celltype_mapping <- c(
  "CAF_Matrix" = "CAFs",
  "Hybrid CHC1" = "Hybrid CHC1", 
  "Hybrid CHC2" = "Hybrid CHC2",
  "Hybrid CHC3" = "Hybrid CHC3",
  "Endothelial cells" = "Endothelial Cells",
  "Epithelial_General" = "Epithelial Cells", 
  "Hybrid THC" = "Hybrid THC"
)

# Check if Final_Sophisticated_Annotation column exists
if (!"Final_Sophisticated_Annotation" %in% colnames(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data)) {
  stop("Final_Sophisticated_Annotation column not found in metadata")
}

# Check which target cell types are actually present
available_celltypes <- intersect(target_celltypes, unique(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation))
missing_celltypes <- setdiff(target_celltypes, available_celltypes)

cat("Available cell types from your list:\n")
print(available_celltypes)
if (length(missing_celltypes) > 0) {
  cat("\nMissing cell types:\n")
  print(missing_celltypes)
  cat("\nAll available cell types in Final_Sophisticated_Annotation:\n")
  print(sort(unique(merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation)))
}

# Filter cells to only include target cell types
cells_to_keep <- merged_seurat_hmm@meta.data$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation %in% available_celltypes
filtered_seurat <- merged_seurat_hmm[, cells_to_keep]

cat("\nFiltered from", ncol(merged_seurat_hmm), "to", ncol(filtered_seurat), "cells\n")

# Create cleaned cell type labels
filtered_seurat@meta.data$Celltype_Clean <- celltype_mapping[filtered_seurat@meta.data$Final_Sophisticated_Annotation]

# Create the TumorModule classification formatted version if not already present
if (!"TumorModule_Classification_Formatted" %in% colnames(filtered_seurat@meta.data)) {
  filtered_seurat@meta.data$TumorModule_Classification_Formatted <- factor(
    case_when(
      filtered_seurat@meta.data$TumorModule_Classification == "High_TumorModule" ~ "High Tumor Module",
      filtered_seurat@meta.data$TumorModule_Classification == "Medium_TumorModule" ~ "Medium Tumor Module",
      filtered_seurat@meta.data$TumorModule_Classification == "Low_TumorModule" ~ "Low Tumor Module",
      TRUE ~ as.character(filtered_seurat@meta.data$TumorModule_Classification)
    ),
    levels = c("High Tumor Module", "Medium Tumor Module", "Low Tumor Module")
  )
}

# Summary statistics
cat("\n=== TumorModule Distribution by Cell Type ===\n")
summary_stats <- filtered_seurat@meta.data %>%
  group_by(Celltype_Clean, TumorModule_Classification_Formatted) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  group_by(Celltype_Clean) %>%
  mutate(
    total = sum(n),
    percentage = round(n/total * 100, 1)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

print(summary_stats)

# Create stacked bar plot
p1 <- ggplot(summary_stats, aes(x = Celltype_Clean, y = n, fill = TumorModule_Classification_Formatted)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("High Tumor Module" = "red", 
                               "Medium Tumor Module" = "gray", 
                               "Low Tumor Module" = "blue")) +
  labs(title = "TumorModule Classification by Cell Type",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "Number of Cells",
       fill = "TumorModule\nClassification") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 6, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm")
  )

# Create percentage stacked bar plot
p2 <- ggplot(summary_stats, aes(x = Celltype_Clean, y = percentage, fill = TumorModule_Classification_Formatted)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("High Tumor Module" = "red", 
                               "Medium Tumor Module" = "gray", 
                               "Low Tumor Module" = "blue")) +
  labs(title = "TumorModule Classification by Cell Type (%)",
       x = "Cell Type",
       y = "Percentage of Cells",
       fill = "TumorModule\nClassification") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 6, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 6),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm")
  )

# Define custom colors for cell types
celltype_colors <- c(
  "Hybrid THC" = "red3",
  "Hybrid CHC1" = rgb(236/255, 164/255, 0/255),
  "Hybrid CHC2" = rgb(40/255, 0/255, 3/255),
  "Hybrid CHC3" = rgb(121/255, 30/255, 148/255),
  "CAFs" = "purple",
  "Epithelial Cells" = "gray45",
  "Endothelial Cells" = "hotpink3"
)

# Create violin plot showing score distributions
if (exists("score_name_combined") && score_name_combined %in% colnames(filtered_seurat@meta.data)) {
  p3 <- ggplot(filtered_seurat@meta.data, aes(x = Celltype_Clean, y = .data[[score_name_combined]])) +
    geom_violin(aes(fill = Celltype_Clean), alpha = 0.7, scale = "width") +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.1, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = celltype_colors) +
    labs(title = "TumorModule Score Distribution by Cell Type",
         x = "Cell Type",
         y = "TumorModule Score") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 6, hjust = 0.5),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 6),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 6),
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.position = "none"
    )
} else {
  p3 <- ggplot() + 
    labs(title = "Score data not available") + 
    theme_void()
}

# Create UMAP showing only selected cell types
p4 <- DimPlot(
  filtered_seurat,
  group.by = "Celltype_Clean",
  pt.size = 0.5,
  cols = celltype_colors
) +
  ggtitle("Selected Cell Types") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 6, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm")
  )

# Create UMAP colored by TumorModule classification for filtered cells
p5 <- DimPlot(
  filtered_seurat,
  group.by = "TumorModule_Classification_Formatted",
  pt.size = 0.5,
  cols = c("High Tumor Module" = "red", "Medium Tumor Module" = "gray", "Low Tumor Module" = "blue")
) +
  ggtitle("TumorModule Classification (Selected Cells)") +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 6, hjust = 0.5),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 6),
    legend.key.size = unit(0.3, "cm")
  )

# Display plots
print(p1)
print(p2) 
print(p3)
print(p4 | p5)

# Save plots
ggsave(
  filename = "250725.Fig7Final/250725.TumorModule_by_CellType_Counts.pdf",
  plot = p1,
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = "250725.Fig7Final/250725.TumorModule_by_CellType_Percentages.pdf",
  plot = p2,
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = "250725.Fig7Final/250725.TumorModule_Score_Distribution_by_CellType.pdf",
  plot = p3,
  width = 6,
  height = 4,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

ggsave(
  filename = "250725.Fig7Final/250725.TumorModule_Selected_CellTypes_UMAP.pdf",
  plot = p4 | p5,
  width = 8,
  height = 4,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 300
)

# Save summary table
write.csv(summary_stats, "250725.Fig7Final/250725.TumorModule_by_CellType_Summary.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat("\nPlots and summary saved to 250725.Fig7Final/ directory:\n")
cat("- 250725.TumorModule_by_CellType_Counts.pdf\n")
cat("- 250725.TumorModule_by_CellType_Percentages.pdf\n") 
cat("- 250725.TumorModule_Score_Distribution_by_CellType.pdf\n")
cat("- 250725.TumorModule_Selected_CellTypes_UMAP.pdf\n")
cat("- 250725.TumorModule_by_CellType_Summary.csv\n")
```
